title: Thai-Style Crispy Cottage Cheese Pilaf
description: A fusion of Thai and Middle Eastern flavors in a crispy, flavorful dish. This Thai-style crispy cottage cheese pilaf is a unique and delicious twist on traditional pilafs.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the Egyptian cheese and stir until melted.
Add the cottage cheese and stir until well combined.
Add the crunchy pilaf and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the soy sauce, fish sauce, sugar, and chili flakes. Stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
Add the lime juice and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped cilantro or scallions if desired.
